tool_input.command:
git add .caliber/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: update Caliber learning state

Auto-generated by Caliber session tracking.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01G5U4Bc1SSdWTeSBbqF3Um9
EOF
)" && git push -u origin claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ
tool_input.description: Commit and push caliber learning state

To http://127.0.0.1:36611/git/jakeoborn/Appetyt

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
# Tavera variants + hospitality-root inventions
for n in \
  tavora taveno tavena tavero tavono tavani taveri \
  taverli tavenor taverra taverno \
  locanda locando locanta locana locane \
  ostera osterio osterra \
  tratto tratia tratti trattio trattoro \
  albero albera albro hostera hosteo \
  mesona mesero mesaro mesero \
  ventera ventero venteri \
  casela casilo casilar caseli casolo \
  cormio cormia convio convito conviva \
  aperia aperva aperio \
  rostra rostia rosta rostola \
  ventaro venturo venterra \
  piazzo piazzi piazza piazzera \
  albori alboro alboro \
  trovato trovara tropera tropea \
  saloa saloia saleri salerno \
  bevare bevara bevora bivra \
  cenalo cenino cena cena ceno \
  terno ternara terno \
  hostero hosting hostral \
  velora velaro velaro verani \
  vinero vinera vinara vinari \
  forno fornelli fornella \
  belota belota bellona bellotta; do
  # Check both .com and .app
  check "${n}.com"
done

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
# Winners' .app check
for n in taverli taverno trattoro hosteo rostola piazzera tropea vinara; do
  check "${n}.app"
done
echo "---"
# Another round of invented hospitality/food roots
for n in \
  tavala tavela tavelo tavico taviro tavori tavri \
  sorella solvera solarina mallera maldero \
  palasso palava palavia paverra paviro pavire \
  tostara tostera tastera tostire tostado \
  gustova gustare gustio vinela vinola vinolo \
  primara primera primaro \
  agorra agoria agorio aganta \
  sentara sentera sentra sentoro \
  orbita orbito orbico orbelo \
  medera medaro medana \
  stradio stratella stradora \
  omera omara omaro omira omera \
  nostalia nostola nostoro \
  vialetto vialo vialero \
  porta portafino porticio porticala \
  sereno serena serenda serendia \
  festara festora festeri \
  mercara mercato mercario mercato \
  cibera cibaro cibio \
  aloma aloria alomira \
  kempo kempra kempora \
  nevra nevara nevria nevera \
  zevo zeva zevalo zevera \
  morata moraria moraro; do
  check "${n}.com"
done
